data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing decision-making time by reducing complexity for the user.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designing interfaces that consider the size and distance of interface elements.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites; make your site similar to common experiences.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting the amount of information processed at a time to enhance user comprehension.

data.title: The Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Users prefer simple and organized layouts that require minimal cognitive load.
